name: Enterprise Release Risk Agent

workflow.description: Open a Slack release review thread with release ID, changed modules, owners, and policy gates.
Call release_risk.review to obtain risk score, impacted services, and recommended tests.
Post targeted test recommendations with owner mentions and acceptance criteria.
Preserve a human approval checkpoint before release promotion.

boundary: This draft is Slack-ready but does not claim a live Slack developer sandbox until one is connected.
